class Solution {
public:
    int minSwaps(string s) {
        int balance = 0;
        int minBalance = 0;
        for (char c : s) {

                balance++;
            } else {

            }
            minBalance = min(minBalance, balance);
        }
        return ( (abs(minBalance) + 1 ) / 2 );
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    int minSwaps(string s) {
        int balance = 0;
        int minBalance = 0;
        for (char c : s) {

};

solution: ```cpp
class Solution {
public:
    int minSwaps(string s) {
        int balance = 0;
        int minBalance = 0;
        for (char c : s) {
            if (c == '[') {
                balance++;
            } else {
                balance--;
            }
            minBalance = min(minBalance, balance);
        }
        return (abs(minBalance) + 1) / 2;
    }
};
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Tracks minimum balance during traversal to determine maximum imbalance. Uses formula (abs(minBalance)+1)/2 to compute minimal swaps. Efficient single-pass approach with constant space.
